translations.es: Estoy intentando mantener una actitud positiva.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在努力保持积极心态。
translations.yue: 我而家盡量保持正面心態。
translations.pt: Estou tentando manter uma atitude positiva.
translations.he: אני מנסה לשמור על גישה חיובית.
translations.vi: Tôi đang cố gắng giữ tinh thần lạc quan.
translations.hi: मैं सकारात्मक बने रहने की कोशिश कर रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg prøver å holde meg positiv.
translations.ro: Încerc să păstrez o atitudine pozitivă.
translations.cs: Snažím se udržet si pozitivní přístup.
translations.da: Jeg prøver at holde mig positiv.
translations.ja: 前向きでいようとしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause and controller of the infinitival complement.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular, present indicative; a control verb that selects a zu-infinitive complement ('zu bleiben').
Predicative adjective complement with 'bleiben', describing the subject's state.
Infinitive marker introducing the non-finite verb 'bleiben'.
Infinitive verb within the zu-infinitive complement of 'versuche'; linking verb that takes the predicative adjective 'positiv'.

sentences.target: Das Feedback war positiv und hilfreich.

translations.de: Das Feedback war positiv und hilfreich.
translations.en: The feedback was positive and helpful.
translations.es: Los comentarios fueron positivos y útiles.
translations.fr: Le retour a été positif et utile.
translations.it: I commenti sono stati positivi e utili.
translations.zh-Hans: 反馈很积极，也很有帮助。
translations.pt: Os comentários foram positivos e úteis.
translations.vi: Phản hồi rất tích cực và hữu ích.
translations.nl: Het commentaar was positief en behulpzaam.
translations.hu: A visszajelzés pozitív és hasznos volt.
translations.pl: Informacja zwrotna była pozytywna i pomocna.
translations.el: Τα σχόλια ήταν θετικά και χρήσιμα.
translations.ro: Comentariile au fost pozitive și utile.
translations.cs: Zpětná vazba byla pozitivní a užitečná.
translations.ja: フィードバックは前向きで役に立ちました。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of 'Feedback'.
Noun, neuter, singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, past tense; links the subject to the predicate adjectives.
Predicative adjective; part of the subject complement after the copula.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicate adjectives ('positiv' and 'hilfreich').
Predicative adjective coordinated with 'positiv' in the subject complement.

sentences.target: Er denkt meistens positiv über andere.

translations.de: Er denkt meistens positiv über andere.
translations.en: He mostly thinks positively of others.
translations.es: Por lo general, piensa bien de los demás.
translations.fr: Le plus souvent, il voit les autres de façon positive.
translations.it: Di solito pensa bene degli altri.
translations.ko: 그는 대체로 다른 사람들을 긍정적으로 봐요.
translations.ru: Он чаще всего хорошо относится к другим.
translations.pt: Na maioria das vezes, ele vê os outros de forma positiva.
translations.he: לרוב הוא חושב טוב על אחרים.
translations.vi: Anh ấy thường nghĩ tốt về người khác.
translations.ar: غالبًا ما يفكر بشكل إيجابي في الآخرين.
translations.nl: Meestal denkt hij positief over anderen.
translations.uk: Зазвичай він добре ставиться до інших.
translations.hi: वह ज़्यादातर दूसरों के बारे में अच्छा सोचता है।
translations.el: Τις περισσότερες φορές σκέφτεται θετικά για τους άλλους.
translations.nb: Han tenker som regel positivt om andre.
translations.id: Dia biasanya berpikir positif tentang orang lain.
translations.sv: Han tänker oftast positivt om andra.
translations.ro: De obicei, el gândește pozitiv despre ceilalți.
translations.cs: Většinou má o ostatních dobré mínění.
translations.da: Han tænker som regel positivt om andre.
translations.ja: 彼はたいてい他人を前向きに見ています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative.
Adverb of frequency modifying 'denkt'.
Adverbial use of an adjective; manner adverb modifying 'denkt'.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a prepositional object.
Indefinite pronoun, plural accusative; object of the preposition 'über'.

sentences.target: Die Nachrichten sind heute positiv für uns.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈnaːxʁɪçtən zɪnt ˈhɔʏ̯tə poːziˈtiːf fyːɐ̯ ʊns./

translations.de: Die Nachrichten sind heute positiv für uns.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈnaːxʁɪçtən zɪnt ˈhɔʏ̯tə poːziˈtiːf fyːɐ̯ ʊns./
translations.en: The news is positive for us today.
translations.es: Las noticias de hoy son buenas para nosotros.
translations.fr: Les nouvelles d'aujourd'hui sont bonnes pour nous.
translations.it: Le notizie di oggi sono buone per noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天的消息对我们有利。
translations.yue: 今日嘅消息對我哋有利。
translations.pt: As notícias de hoje são boas para nós.
translations.vi: Tin hôm nay là tin tốt cho chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Het nieuws van vandaag is goed voor ons.
translations.hi: आज की खबरें हमारे लिए अच्छी हैं।
translations.pl: Dzisiejsze wiadomości są dla nas dobre.
translations.el: Τα σημερινά νέα είναι καλά για εμάς.
translations.nb: Dagens nyheter er gode for oss.
translations.id: Berita hari ini bagus untuk kami.
translations.sv: Dagens nyheter är bra för oss.
translations.ro: Știrile de astăzi sunt bune pentru noi.
translations.cs: Dnešní zprávy jsou pro nás dobré.
translations.da: Dagens nyheder er gode for os.
translations.fi: Tämän päivän uutiset ovat meille hyviä.
translations.ja: 今日のニュースは私たちにとっていい知らせです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of 'Nachrichten'.
Noun, plural; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present tense; links the subject to the predicative adjective.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Predicative adjective; subject complement after the copula.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a beneficiary prepositional phrase.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, accusative; object of 'für'.
